---
title: "Estimating Party-user Similarity in Voting Advice Applications using Hidden Markov Models"
author: "Agathokleous, M., Tsapatsoulis, N., and Djouvas, C."
date: 2016-01-01
description: "ACM RecSys 2016 Workshop on Interfaces and Human Decision Making"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/conference.png
---
